---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Parahub
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser**: (e.g., Firefox 128, Chrome 126)
- **OS**: (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15)
- **Device**: (e.g., Desktop, Android phone)
- **Self-hosted version**: (git tag or commit hash, if known)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (console errors, network responses, etc.).
